race.description: Air Force Country Boosted Mdn Hcp
race.comment: REDS EXPRESS (5) was no match for a dominant winner at the Sapphire Coast last start but did close nicely to be best of the rest. A fairer track this time should suit, as will the rise in trip. Inching towards a maiden win and this presents as a golden opportunity. STEP QUICK (4) missed by 4.3L behind a sharp one at Moruya last week and comes here on the quick turnaround. She steps out to this trip for just the second time but it does looks to suit on what she's done this time in work. Can make an impact. NOTHING SPECIAL (8) was strong on resumption behind REDS EXPRESS when sticking on from being on the speed. Fitter now and this looks to shape similarly. Can feature in the finish once again. MELODIA PERFECTA (2) will be fitter for the fresh effort and can improve today. FRED ASTERN (3) gets the blinkers on third-up today and can be thereabouts.
